overall.description: A third-person horror game scene following a character in a Japanese school uniform through a foggy forest and shrine graveyard at dusk, transitioning into a pitch-black corridor illuminated only by a handheld lantern. The environment features traditional torii gates, stone grave markers, and dense atmospheric fog.

passing under the stone torii gate into the shrine grounds

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path toward the stone shrine gate

entered.detail: large weathered stone shrine gate emerging from the fog
moss-covered stone structure visible through the trees
tall dense trees lining both sides of the path
traditional stone lantern beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense foggy forest along a narrow dirt path. A large stone torii gate looms ahead through the blue-tinted mist, which the character passes under to enter the shrine grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: shrine graveyard with scattered stone markers

events.description: entering the open graveyard area with scattered stone monuments
approaching the wooden torii gate with sacred shimenawa rope

agents.ego_description: walking through the graveyard, navigating between stone markers and scattered trees

entered.detail: weathered stone grave markers scattered throughout the clearing
sparse trees with twisted branches dotting the graveyard
weathered wooden shrine gate with visible shimenawa rope

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the stone gate, the character explores an open graveyard filled with weathered stone markers and twisted trees. The forest canopy opens up to reveal a wooden torii gate in the distance adorned with sacred rope.

scene_state.functional_zone: shrine entrance with wooden torii gate and shimenawa

events.description: passing through the wooden torii gate with sacred shimenawa rope

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the wooden torii gate into the enclosed shrine inner area

thick sacred rope with white paper streamers hanging across the gate

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a weathered wooden torii gate adorned with thick shimenawa rope and white streamers. Passing through the gate, the surroundings become more enclosed with wooden fences and muddy ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark enclosed corridor of red torii gates

events.description: environment shifts to complete darkness as character lights a handheld lantern
entering the tunnel-like corridor formed by red torii gates

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the pitch-black corridor holding a lantern that casts a warm yellow glow

entered.detail: traditional Japanese lantern emitting warm yellow light held by the character
series of red wooden torii gates forming a tunnel-like corridor
sacred ropes with paper streamers hanging between the gate columns

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to complete darkness as the character raises a lantern, revealing a narrow corridor formed by red torii gates. The warm lantern light illuminates the weathered wooden pillars and hanging shimenawa ropes in the oppressive darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty forest that gradually descends into an oppressive, pitch-black corridor. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path through blue-tinted fog, moving steadily toward a looming stone torii gate. As the character passes under the gate, the environment opens into a weathered graveyard filled with stone markers and twisted trees before the path leads toward a distant wooden gate adorned with sacred rope. The scene then shifts as the character passes through this second gate, with the surroundings becoming more enclosed by wooden fences and muddy ground. Finally, the world plunges into complete darkness, where the only visibility comes from a handheld lantern illuminating a narrow, claustrophobic corridor of red torii gates.
